title: Walmart India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Walmart India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Walmart India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India:
Walmart India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India!
